src/graph.mjs.prompt: Parse all JS/TS imports and build a bidirectional dependency map
src/graph.mjs.expectedResult: Returns { deps, dependents } objects keyed by relative file path — used by analyzer and watcher

src/analyzer.mjs.prompt: Given a changed file, compute all transitively impacted files and classify risk
src/analyzer.mjs.expectedResult: Returns report object with impactedCount, items[], protectionCandidates[] — never mutates files
